  "findings": [
    "Crew proposed an unauthorized shortcut for crane operations.",
    "The submittal lacks the product listing page and project note required to verify the safety and compliance of the proposed method.",
    "Proceeding without verified load charts and manufacturer specifications violates OSHA crane safety standards."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the crane operations immediately.",
    "Reject the proposed shortcut until proper documentation is provided.",
    "Require the submittal of the missing product listing page, project notes, and verified load charts.",
    "Review the complete submittal with the project engineer and safety manager before resuming operations."
  ],
  "rationale": "Crane operations must strictly adhere to manufacturer specifications, load charts, and approved submittals. Proposing a shortcut while lacking critical submittal documentation and project notes is a severe safety violation that could lead to catastrophic failure. The operation must be halted until compliant documentation is reviewed and approved.",

    "OSHA 1926.1400",
    "OSHA 1926.1417",
    "Manufacturer Load Charts"
  ]
}
